zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II於1292年出生在波蘭多爾諾希利a斯吉沃格福斯吉沃格奧福時，他的父親Heinrich III Duke of Silesia-Glogau35歲，母親Mechthild von Braunschweig-Lüneburg16歲。他於1310年1月5日與Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1342年1月22日在波蘭多爾諾希利a斯吉沃格福斯吉享年50歲，埋葬在波蘭盧布斯吉雜幹雜幹。

meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II was born in 1292, in Głogów, Głogów, Lower Silesia, Poland, his father, Heinrich III Duke of Silesia-Glogau, was 35 and his mother, Mechthild von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, was 16. He married Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel on 5 January 1310. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 22 January 1342, in Głogów, Lower Silesia, Poland, at the age of 50, and was buried in Żagań, Żagań, Lubusz, Poland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II est né en 1292, à Głogów, głogowski, dolnośląskie, Pologne, son père, Heinrich III Duke of Silesia-Glogau, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mechthild von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel le 5 janvier 1310. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 22 janvier 1342, à głogowski, dolnośląskie, Pologne, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Żagań, Żagań, lubuskie, Pologne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II 1292 in Głogów, głogowski, Niederschlesien, Polen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Heinrich III Duke of Silesia-Glogau 35 und seine Mutter Mechthild von Braunschweig-Lüneburg 16. Er hat am 5. Januar 1310 Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Januar 1342 im Alter von 50 Jahren in głogowski, Niederschlesien, Polen und wurde in Sagan, Żagań, lubuskie, Polen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II è nato il nel 1292 nel Głogów, głogowski, dolnośląskie, Polonia, il suo padre, Heinrich III Duke of Silesia-Glogau, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Mechthild von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel il 5 gennaio 1310. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 22 gennaio 1342, nel głogowski, dolnośląskie, Polonia, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Żagań, Żagań, lubuskie, Polonia.

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II(이)가 1292년 폴란드 도노sa스키 그l고우스키 그l그ow에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Heinrich III Duke of Silesia-Glogau(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Mechthild von Braunschweig-Lüneburg(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1310년 1월 5일 Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1342년 1월 22일 폴란드 도노sa스키 그l고우스키에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 폴란드 루버스키 z아가n z아가n에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II nasceu em 1292, em Głogów, głogowski, dolnośląskie, Polônia, seu pai, Heinrich III Duke of Silesia-Glogau, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Mechthild von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel em 5 de janeiro de 1310. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de janeiro de 1342, em głogowski, dolnośląskie, Polônia, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Żagań, Żagań, lubuskie, Polônia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II родился в 1292 г. в местности гlогoв, гlогоуски, долноsлaски, Польша, его отцу по имени Heinrich III Duke of Silesia-Glogau было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mechthild von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel 5 января 1310 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 22 января 1342 г. в местности гlогоуски, долноsлaски, Польша в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности zагаn, zагаn, лубуски, Польша.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II nació en 1292, en Głogów, głogowski, dolnośląskie, Polonia, su papá, Heinrich III Duke of Silesia-Glogau, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Mechthild von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel el 5 de enero de 1310. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de enero de 1342, en głogowski, dolnośląskie, Polonia, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Żagań, Żagań, lubuskie, Polonia.
